title: Dense Decadent Peruvian Cheese Tagine
description: A spicy and energizing Peruvian dish featuring gooey cheese slices in a rich coconut cream sauce, cooked to perfection in a traditional clay tajine vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the diced tomatoes, red pepper flakes, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
In the clay tajine vessel, arrange a layer of the tomato mixture, followed by a layer of cheese slices.
Drizzle the coconut cream over the cheese slices, making sure they are fully coated.
Repeat the layering process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top layer of cheese.
Cover the tajine vessel with a lid and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Remove the tajine from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with minced garlic and serve hot.
